steps.title: Trace the shared topic
steps.content: The passage begins with a study of ocean acidification's effect on fish behavior. It then discusses a later review of conclusions about that same topic and the risk of exaggerated effects.

steps.title: Reject unrelated topics
steps.content: Choice A concerns overfishing and marine diversity. Choice B concerns fish-capture technology, and Choice C concerns predator feeding patterns. None of those topics appears in the passage. The shared research topic is acidification and fish behavior. The answer is D.
